name: agent-template
description: Full-stack template for AI-powered applications - prompt your own systems

scripts.db:restart: npm run db:down && npm run db:up
scripts.migration:add: cd packages/dotnet-api && dotnet ef migrations add
scripts.migration:update: cd packages/dotnet-api && dotnet ef database update
scripts.migration:remove: cd packages/dotnet-api && dotnet ef migrations remove
scripts.setup: npm run db:up && npm run api:restore && npm run web:install && npm run migration:update
scripts.dev: npm run db:up && dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -n "API,WEB" -c "blue,magenta" "npm run api:watch" "npm run web:dev"
scripts.dev:api: npm run db:up && dotenv -e .env -- npm run api:watch

author: Agent Template
